title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MBD Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MBD Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MBD Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MBD Group:
MBD Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group!
